# App Utils Helpers

## When to Use
- Can helper sort query, OTP generator

## Procedure
1. Tao `getSortOrder` parse chuoi `field:asc|desc`.
2. Provide default sort field neu input null.
3. Tao `generateOtp` 6 chu so.

## Output Checklist
- Sort parse dung regex
- OTP tra ve chuoi
